expert_review.rationale: R1 class changes from fail to warn at +5% threshold (61.75 -> 68.25 analysis).

validation_notes: All logic, calculations, and thresholds were reconstructed solely from embedded packet values.
Observed_risk_score, margin, and classification were computed for R1-R4.
5% threshold sensitivity tested for both directions.
All remediation combinations were evaluated against the budget 95000 USD with arithmetic checks.

artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
